name: jni_home_auto_shared
description: Shared types and classes for JNI Home Automation.

scripts.test_core: rm -rf ./dist && tsc -b && npx eslint . && LOG_SETUP=prod mocha dist/test-core/**/*.js --recursive --exit
scripts.test_all: rm -rf ./dist && tsc -b && npx eslint . && LOG_SETUP=prod mocha dist/test-core/**/*.js --recursive --exit && LOG_SETUP=prod mocha --timeout 10000 dist/test-integration/**/*.js --recursive --exit

author: jni@mopore.org
